name: Aura Pulse
description: Sovereign contract runtime for the Aura OS agent layer. Surfaces decisions, manages connectors, and guards the shared project filesystem.

workspaceId.description: Stable workspace slug, e.g. studio-ops. Default: default

pulseStaticDir.description: Optional override for Pulse static asset directory.

signalDebounceMs.description: Signal file debounce window in ms. Default: 75

engramBridgeEnabled.description: Enable Engram completion bridge. Default: true

engramHttpUrl.description: Engram HTTP base URL. Default: http://localhost:4318

projectRootOverride.description: Optional explicit File Bridge project root override.

workspaceDir.description: Workspace directory used for HEARTBEAT.md trigger bootstrap.

bootstrapEnabled.description: Enable openclaw.json writes, plugin installs, and trigger bootstrap. Default: false

openClawConfigPath.description: Optional explicit path to the target openclaw.json.

accountIds.description: Named account identifiers keyed by service, for example { "gmail": "studio-ops@gmail.com" }.

ttl.description: TTL and retention settings for contracts.

checkIntervalMs.description: TTL poll interval in ms. Default: 60000

completeRetentionDays.description: Retention window for complete contracts. Default: 30

failedRetentionDays.description: Retention window for failed contracts. Default: 7
